columns.extraction_plan: The experimental treatment arm is "Abiraterone acetate plus prednisolone (AAP)". This is explicitly stated in the abstract on page 2: "Abiraterone acetate plus prednisolone (AAP) previously demonstrated improved survival in STAMPEDE". Further details are provided on page 3 in the abstract: "abiraterone acetate 1000 mg + prednisolone 5 mg (SOC + AAP)".
